name: Require OtterSec Verified Programs
description: Blocks transactions involving programs not verified by OtterSec (cryptographic source verification)

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Transaction involves unverified program (source code not cryptographically verified)

name: Warn on Unverified Programs
description: Alerts when transaction involves programs without OtterSec verification

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Transaction involves {unverified_count} program(s) without cryptographic verification

name: Block Delegations to Unverified Programs
description: Blocks token approvals to programs without OtterSec verification

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Cannot approve delegation to unverified program (no reproducible build)

name: Require Verified Programs for High-Value Transactions
description: High-value transactions must only use OtterSec verified programs

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: High-value transaction (>10 SOL) must use verified programs only

name: Require Verification for Critical Operations
description: Critical operations (delegations, authority changes) require verified programs

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Critical operations require cryptographically verified programs
